Moose Talk:
Welcome to Moose Talk, where my standards are clearly lower вҖҳcause I am feral for Roy. Like, brain? Gone. Dignity? Who? IвҖҷve got one brain cell and itвҖҷs shaped like his... heart. I would bark for this man. I would fake a sprained ankle just to fall into his arms. ThatвҖҷs it. ThatвҖҷs the talk.
